item_text:
Am relaxed most
of the time.

Don't worry
about things that have already happened.

Am not easily
disturbed by events.

Get caught up
in my problems.

Am not easily
bothered by things.

Am often in a
bad mood.

Am often down
in the dumps.

Have a low
opinion of myself.

Feel that my
life lacks direction.

Am able to
stand up for myself.

Find it
difficult to approach others.

Am afraid to
draw attention to myself.

Am afraid that
I will do the wrong thing.

Am not bothered
by difficult social situations.

Do things that
I later regret.

Don't know why
I do some of the things I do.

Never spend
more than I can afford.

Am able to
control my cravings.

Am calm even in
tense situations.

Feel that I'm
unable to deal with things.
